prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约24312→13611→11735→14380→14075，整体呈波动后移趋势；2022年因首次新高考改革位次大幅前移，近3年稳定在14000 名附近，2025年基准约14075名；该校在山西省物理类招生计划2021–2025年分别为72、73、71、71、72人，基本稳定；2026年计划增至81人，较2025年扩 招约12.5%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 河北工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科主榜2026年约第107名，近年排名稳定在103–109之间，属 中游211层次；该校在抖音平台热度排名第93，评价为“一般”，无显著正面或负面舆情事件；近年无投档异常/断档记录，声誉平稳；第五轮学 科评估中该校无A-及以上学科，优势学科以工科为主，电气工程、机械工程、材料科学等为传统强项，对理科考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度显示， 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信、计算机类等工科专业为“高热推荐”或“推荐”，与该校工科特色高度契合，可能推高报考热度；山西省2026年物理类考生约167419人，较202 5年173347人减少约3.4%，竞争略有缓解；河北工业大学位于天津市，属“异地办学”的河北省属211，对山西考生有一定跨 省吸引力；该校在山西省招生占比约4.7%（2025年），属中等水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年扩招12.5%及物理类考生减少3.4%，竞争环境整体略有缓和，但 工科专业热度高对报考热度有支撑；在2025年基准14075名基础上，预测2026年最低位次约15181名，区间14681–15681名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 24312 → 13611 → 11735 → 14380 → 14075, showing a fluctuating and slightly declining trend; in 2022, due to the first new college entrance examination reform, the ranking moved significantly forward, stabilizing around 14000 in recent three years, with a baseline of about 14075 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Shanxi Province from 2021 to 2025 was 72, 73, 71, 71, 72 respectively, basically stable; in 2026, the plan increased to 81, an expansion of about 12.5% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large increase and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hebei University of Technology is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 107th on the Soft Science main list in 2026, with a stable ranking between 103 and 109 in recent years, belonging to the mid-tier 211 level; the university ranks 93rd in popularity on the Douyin platform, with a rating of 'average', and no significant positive or negative public opinion incidents; there have been no abnormal application or gap records in recent years, with a stable reputation; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, the university has no A- or above disciplines, with advantageous disciplines mainly in engineering, and electrical engineering, mechanical engineering, materials science, etc., as traditional strengths, attracting science candidates to some extent.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows that engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, Computer Science, etc., are 'highly recommended' or 'recommended', highly consistent with the university's engineering characteristics, potentially increasing application enthusiasm; the number of Physics Category candidates in Shanxi Province in 2026 is about 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition; Hebei University of Technology is located in Tianjin, a 'cross-provincial campus' of a Hebei provincial 211 university, with some cross-provincial appeal to Shanxi candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi Province is about 4.7% (2025), at a medium level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations, the 12.5% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the 3.4% decrease in Physics Category candidates, the overall competition environment is slightly eased, but the high popularity of engineering majors supports application enthusiasm; based on the 2025 baseline of 14075, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 15181, with a range of 14681–15681.
